title: goes #1114
definition:
1) a wailer, a howler
 2) a juggler, enchanter (because incantations used to be uttered
    in a kind of howl)
 3) a deceiver, imposter

    in a kind of howl)

    NASB:  a wailer, a sorcerer, a swindler:
